Name: Advanced_Copper_Tools
Author: Jared
Description: Adds copper-and-bronze metalworking content: metal sheets and nails, a small copper stove, wearable metal pan (multi-metal), large copper saw with bonus tree-cutting, wheelbarrow with weight reduction, copper bathtub (3 states), 4-variant metal lantern with rendered oil, copper oil flask, copper tea kettle, sealed copper chest, and a 3-variant Tea Blending Station with six herb slots, passive drying, a Grind All action, and a built-in heated water reservoir.
